summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Arena Mobile Feed implementation. All core features working correctly including Hero Block, Filter Chips, Market Cards with FOMO indicators, and Bet Sheet bottom sheet functionality.

design_issues.issue: Plus/minus buttons for amount adjustment may not be working as expected
No visible theme toggle button in UI, though theme system works via localStorage

passed_tests: Arena page loads with Hero Block showing trending/whale activity
Filter Chips work (Trending, Live, Closing, Volume)
Market Cards display with title, percentages, stats
FOMO badges appear (whale, trending, closing soon, bets/hr)
Clicking YES opens Bet Sheet bottom sheet
Clicking NO opens Bet Sheet bottom sheet
Bet Sheet shows market title and side indicator
Place Bet button displays with correct amount
